content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Strip". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/487/problem/B
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of strings. Then n lines follow, each containing a string s.
content.outputFormat: For each string, print the minimum length of the substring that contains all the unique characters of the string.
